The '''Degan Gas Clouds''' were patches of gas clouds and [[Nebula/Legends|nebulae]] located in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].

==Description==
The Degan Gas clouds were several smaller bodies of gas clouds that surrounded the the [[Dega system/Legends|Dega]] and [[Osirrag system/Legends|Osirrag systems]]. Although these nebulae posed a navigational hazard, a trade route had been established that connected the Dega and Osirrag systems with the [[Kidron system/Legends|Kidron system]] on the [[Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route]].<ref name="PotG3" />

==History==
The Gas Clouds were the source to numerous legends and rumors. Some said, the nebulae were home to a group of [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]], fiercely guarding their territory. Others claimed that there were several rogue [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoids]] hidden inside the Clouds, where a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] had once hidden his treasure. Another set of legends told of a "[[ghost ship]]" or "dimensional creaure" that either helped or attacked any [[Starship/Legends|ships]] that ventured into the Clouds. [[Spacer/Legends|Spacers]] publicly dismissed these tales, but none had ever dared to investigate the Clouds himself.<ref name="PotG3" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Brazen]]'' was [[Ambush near the Degan Gas Clouds|ambushed]] near the Gas Clouds by the [[Khuiumin Survivors]].<ref name="OE" />
